offer: For property managers processing 5–15 utility invoices/month, manual tracking causes inaccuracies in financial reporting. We automate the generation of monthly utility expense reports instead of manual tracking and spreadsheet management.
problem: Inaccurate financial reporting due to manual tracking of utility expenses.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Share insights on Indie Hackers forums
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for property management tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of utility invoices and reports
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
